ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., point guard, power forward) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is affiliated with */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_position" INTEGER /* Position the player was drafted in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team is part of */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team is part of */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's arena */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Final score of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the game was played in */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds grabbed by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player in the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the season */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored by the player per game */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the player in the season */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage of the player in the season */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds grabbed by the player per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists made by the player per game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Average steals made by the player per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Average blocks made by the player per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the league commissioner */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the division is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the player returned from the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
